headline: Caterpillar, Nvidia Chipmaker Lead Five Stocks Near Buy Points
summary: Caterpillar and Nvidia chipmaker Taiwan Semiconductor are both AI stocks. They lead five stocks to watch near buy points as the market soars.

headline: Caterpillar Buys Monarch Tractor To Deepen Automation And Electrification Story
summary: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) has acquired Monarch Tractor, a company focused on autonomous and electric tractors. The deal expands Caterpillar’s efforts in automation and electrification across off road equipment. Monarch’s software, hardware platforms, and engineering teams are expected to feed into Caterpillar’s technology roadmap. Caterpillar enters this deal with shares at $794.65 and multi year gains, including 32.8% year to date and 276.9% over five years. For investors who have mostly...

headline: Trump eyes "historic" China summit as Xi welcomes Hormuz reopening
summary: Investing.com -- President Donald Trump has signaled that a high-stakes meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping is imminent, suggesting that the summit could be "historic" as both nations coordinate on the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and regional energy security.
